caption: A person with a white watch on their left wrist is shown working on a white tabletop. They are manipulating a square piece of patterned paper with olive green, yellow, and white mottled colors. In the beginning, they hold the paper by the left edge, and then they use their right hand to adjust its position on a clear cutting mat. Nearby objects include a silver ruler, an ink pad labeled "MEMENTO", and small packages with text such as "Thank You". A watermark reading "Stamping Jill" is visible in the bottom left corner of each scene. As the sequence progresses, the person shifts the patterned paper, sliding it across the mat while guiding it with both hands to align it for a project.
